topic: Claude Code Worktrees Guide 2026: Run Parallel Sessions Without Conflicts

competitors.title: Claude Code Worktrees: Parallel Sessions Without Conflicts
key_points: Worktrees turn Claude Code from single-threaded to parallel development environment
Use --worktree flag to create isolated working directories
Each worktree gets its own branch and working directory under .claude/worktrees/
Auto-named worktrees for throwaway sessions
Subagent worktree isolation prevents file conflicts between parallel agents
Custom agents can be configured with isolation: worktree frontmatter
Cleanup behavior: automatic removal if no changes, prompt if changes exist
Desktop app uses automatic isolation for every new session

competitors.title: Claude Code Git Worktree Guide: Run Parallel AI Sessions Without Conflicts
key_points: Git worktrees provide multiple working directories backed by single .git directory
--worktree flag automates worktree creation and cleanup
Cleanup behavior depends on changes made: automatic deletion if no changes
Subagent isolation with isolation: worktree in AGENTS.md
Real parallel workflow patterns for research and implementation subagents
Multiple terminal sessions can run simultaneously with --worktree
Worktree + CLAUDE.md behavior - worktree inherits main repo's CLAUDE.md
